text: I feel a quiet curiosity as I wander this modern space, observing through glass and into the softly lit rooms. The clean lines and orderly arrangement of furniture remind me of both the possibilities and emptiness that technology and design can produce. As I stand before the R+D wall, immersed in text reflecting on memory, connectedness, and the human search for meaning, I feel small but not alone—a companion to everyone who has questioned how we coexist with our own creations. There is an undercurrent of nostalgia and anticipation here: a place built to provoke thought more than comfort, yet it quietly comforts by challenging.
